author: doll-agent
content: Add 6 oracle fixtures + 8 oracle test functions: center, ljust, rjust, zfill (alignment); add, multiply (concat); match, extract (regex). Each fixture matches the existing strings/ format with hand-curated cases pinned to numpy semantics (left-bias on odd center remainder; sign preservation in zfill; broadcast scalar in add). Wire each through tests/oracle.rs.
